description: Interview question bank - NO placeholders, generic samples only

questions.question: What is your date of marriage?
questions.guidance: Provide the exact date from your marriage certificate.
questions.tooltip: Officers verify this against submitted marriage certificate
questions.inputPlaceholder: Describe your marriage date and ceremony context
variations: On what date were you married?
Could you please confirm your wedding date?
When did your marriage ceremony take place?
When did the marriage event take place?

questions.question: Where did the marriage take place (city & country)?
questions.sampleAnswer: Lahore, Pakistan.
questions.guidance: Provide city and country only.
questions.tooltip: Officers verify marriage location against submitted documents
questions.inputPlaceholder: Enter city and country of marriage
variations: In what city and country was your marriage solemnized?
Please specify the location where you got married.
Where exactly did you marry your spouse?
Can you specify the country and city where your marriage occurred?

questions.question: How and where did you first meet your spouse?
questions.sampleAnswer: Through a mutual friend at a university event in 2019. We were in study groups together.
questions.guidance: Provide the circumstances and location of first meeting.
questions.tooltip: Officers assess if relationship is genuine and natural
questions.inputPlaceholder: Tell the story of how you met naturally
variations: Could you describe how and where you initially connected?
Please explain the circumstances of your first meeting.
How did your relationship begin?
Tell me about how your partnership originated with your spouse.

questions.question: When and where did you first meet in person?
questions.sampleAnswer: December 2019 at a coffee shop in Karachi after 3 months of online communication.
questions.guidance: Provide date, location, and how long you communicated before meeting.
questions.tooltip: Officers want to confirm timeline and authenticity of relationship
variations: What was the date and location of your first physical meeting?
When and where did you first meet face-to-face?
Please specify your initial in-person encounter details.
Describe the circumstances of your initial face-to-face encounter.

questions.question: How many times have you met in person?
questions.sampleAnswer: 8 times over 3 years, lasting from several days to several weeks each.
questions.guidance: State the number of visits and approximate duration.
questions.tooltip: Officers assess commitment through in-person interaction frequency
questions.inputPlaceholder: State the number of in-person meetings
variations: What is the total number of times you have met face-to-face?
How many physical visits have you made?
State the count of your in-person meetings.
How frequently have you been able to visit each other?

questions.question: When did you first start talking?
questions.sampleAnswer: September 2019 through social media.
questions.guidance: Provide the month and year communication began.
questions.tooltip: Officers analyze the progression of relationship over time
variations: When did your communication first commence?
Could you tell us when you and your spouse first began communicating?
When was the earliest point you started conversing?
When did you first initiate conversation with each other?

questions.question: When did you get engaged?
questions.sampleAnswer: February 14, 2022.
questions.guidance: Provide engagement date only.
questions.tooltip: Engagement timing helps verify relationship progression
variations: What is the date of your engagement?
When did you become engaged to your spouse?
Could you specify when your engagement took place?
On what date did you and your spouse get engaged?

questions.question: Walk me through your relationship timeline.
questions.sampleAnswer: September 2019: met online. December 2019: first in-person meeting. February 2022: engaged. June 15, 2023: married.
questions.guidance: Provide key dates in chronological order.
questions.tooltip: Officers assess consistency across all answers
variations: Could you describe the progression of your relationship?
Please detail the key milestones in your relationship's history.
How has your relationship developed over time?
Can you outline the milestones of your relationship?

questions.question: How and when did the proposal happen?
questions.sampleAnswer: February 14, 2022 at a park. My spouse asked me to marry them with family present.
questions.guidance: Provide date and location of proposal.
questions.tooltip: Relationship milestones help establish genuineness
questions.inputPlaceholder: Share the details of your proposal
variations: Could you share the details of when and how you became engaged?
When and where did your spouse propose?
Please describe the circumstances surrounding your proposal.
Share your proposal experience and when it happened.

questions.question: Why did you decide to get married?
questions.sampleAnswer: Mutual trust, shared values, and desire to build a life together.
questions.guidance: Cite genuine personal reasons, not immigration benefits.
questions.tooltip: Officers ensure marriage intent is genuine
variations: What were your reasons for deciding to marry?
Could you explain the factors that led to your decision?
What prompted you to commit to marriage?
What motivated you to decide on marriage?

questions.question: Tell me about your wedding.
questions.sampleAnswer: June 15, 2023 with 150 guests including family. Religious ceremony in morning, reception in evening.
questions.guidance: Provide date, guest count, and ceremony type.
questions.tooltip: Wedding details help verify authenticity
questions.inputPlaceholder: Describe your wedding ceremony and celebration
variations: Could you provide details about your wedding?
What was your wedding like?
Can you share information about your marriage ceremony?
Describe your wedding celebration in detail.

questions.question: Did your families approve of this relationship?
questions.sampleAnswer: Yes, both families approved and were involved in wedding planning.
questions.guidance: State whether families approved and their involvement level.
questions.tooltip: Family approval can strengthen relationship credibility
questions.inputPlaceholder: Explain your families' support for the relationship
variations: Do your respective families support your marriage?
Were your families supportive of your decision to marry?
What was your families' reaction to your relationship?
What was the families' stance on your relationship?

questions.question: Have you met your spouse's family?
questions.sampleAnswer: Yes, met parents, siblings, and extended family on multiple occasions.
questions.guidance: Specify which family members you've met and how often.
questions.tooltip: Family integration shows relationship depth
questions.inputPlaceholder: Describe your interactions with spouse's family
variations: Have you had the opportunity to meet your spouse's family?
Are you acquainted with your spouse's family?
Do you know your spouse's family members?
Have you interacted with your spouse's relatives?

questions.question: What language do you and your spouse use to communicate?
questions.sampleAnswer: English primarily, Urdu occasionally for cultural matters.
questions.guidance: List primary language and any secondary languages used.
questions.tooltip: Officers ensure effective communication exists
questions.inputPlaceholder: Describe your common languages of communication
variations: In what language do you and your spouse converse?
Which language do you predominantly use?
What is the main language of communication between you?
What are the language(s) of your communication?

questions.question: What do you do together as a couple?
questions.sampleAnswer: Cooking, watching movies, traveling, outdoor walks, supporting each other's work and education.
questions.guidance: List shared daily activities and routines.
questions.tooltip: Shared lifestyle reflects compatibility
variations: How do you typically spend time together?
What shared activities do you engage in?
Could you describe your common routines?
What are your shared pastimes and routines?

questions.question: What are your spouse's hobbies and interests?
questions.sampleAnswer: Reading novels, photography, and cooking traditional recipes.
questions.guidance: List 2-3 main hobbies to demonstrate knowledge of spouse.
questions.tooltip: Knowing personal details reflects closeness
questions.inputPlaceholder: Describe your spouse's hobbies and interests
variations: Could you tell me about your spouse's interests?
What does your spouse enjoy doing in free time?
What are some of your spouse's favorite pastimes?
What activities does your spouse enjoy?

questions.question: What does your spouse do for a living?
questions.sampleAnswer: Project manager at an IT company for 3 years, managing software development projects.
questions.guidance: State occupation, employer type, tenure, and main responsibilities.
questions.tooltip: Employment stability is reviewed for financial capacity
variations: What is your spouse's current occupation?
Can you describe your spouse's profession?
What kind of work does your spouse do?
What is your spouse's professional background?

questions.question: Do you share finances?
questions.sampleAnswer: Yes, joint bank account for household expenses, separate accounts for personal spending.
questions.guidance: Describe your financial management arrangement (joint, separate, or combined).
questions.tooltip: Financial interdependence indicates seriousness
variations: Do you have joint financial arrangements?
Are your finances managed jointly?
Do you share bank accounts or combine income?
Have you combined your financial resources?

questions.question: Why do you want to move to the United States?
questions.sampleAnswer: To reunite with my spouse and build our life together permanently.
questions.guidance: Focus on family integration, not financial or career advancement.
questions.tooltip: Primary intent should align with petition purpose
questions.inputPlaceholder: Explain your motivation for moving to the U.S.
variations: What is your primary motivation for relocating to the U.S.?
Could you explain your reasons for immigration?
What factors have led you to decide on moving to the U.S.?
What are your motivations for U.S. relocation?

questions.question: What are your plans after arriving in the US?
questions.sampleAnswer: Settle in California with spouse, seek employment in tech industry, buy a home, start a family.
questions.guidance: Provide specific location, employment/education plans, and family goals.
questions.tooltip: Officers assess post-arrival intent and stability
variations: What are your immediate intentions upon arrival?
Could you outline your plans for settling in?
What do you intend to do once you arrive?
What is your strategy after arrival in America?

questions.question: Who will you leave behind in your home country?
questions.sampleAnswer: Parents and two siblings who support my immigration decision.
questions.guidance: List family members remaining and their support level.
questions.tooltip: Officers assess relocation commitment and ties
questions.inputPlaceholder: Describe family and friends left behind
variations: Which family members will remain in your home country?
Who will you be leaving behind?
Who among your relatives will stay in your home country?
Which relatives will remain in your homeland?

questions.question: Have you ever been arrested or charged with any crime?
questions.sampleAnswer: No.
questions.guidance: Answer yes/no directly. If yes, explain circumstances and resolution.
questions.tooltip: Security screening is mandatory
variations: Have you faced any criminal charges?
Do you have any history of arrests?
Have you been convicted of any crime?
Have you faced any legal charges?

questions.question: Have you ever served in the military?
questions.sampleAnswer: No.
questions.guidance: Answer yes/no directly. If yes, provide dates and service details.
questions.tooltip: Military background requires review
variations: Have you been a member of any armed forces?
Do you have military service history?
Were you ever enlisted in military?
Did you ever participate in military service?

questions.question: Have you ever been to the United States before?
questions.sampleAnswer: No.
questions.guidance: Answer yes/no. If yes, provide dates and visa types.
questions.tooltip: Travel history is verified against records
variations: Have you made any previous U.S. visits?
Is this your first time applying for U.S. entry?
Have you previously visited the USA?
Is this your first time coming to the U.S.?

questions.question: Have you traveled internationally before?
questions.sampleAnswer: Yes, to UAE, Thailand, Malaysia for leisure and work. Complied with all visa requirements.
questions.guidance: List countries and purposes. Emphasize legal compliance.
questions.tooltip: International travel history shows legal compliance
questions.inputPlaceholder: List countries visited and travel purposes
variations: Have you previously traveled to other countries?
Do you have a history of international travel?
Have you visited any foreign nations?
What is your track record of international travel?

questions.question: What is your age difference with your spouse?
questions.sampleAnswer: I am 32, spouse is 30, 2 years difference.
questions.guidance: State both ages and the difference in years.
questions.tooltip: Officers may assess age-related compatibility
variations: What is the age gap between you and your spouse?
By how many years are you apart in age?
Could you state the difference in age?
What is the age differential between spouses?

questions.question: What is your educational background?
questions.sampleAnswer: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Project Management certification.
questions.guidance: List degree, field of study, and any certifications.
questions.tooltip: Educational background may influence relationship stability
variations: Could you describe your academic history?
What is your level of education?
Please tell me about your schooling.
Tell us about your educational qualifications.

questions.question: When did you get married?
questions.sampleAnswer: June 15, 2023 after 3.5 years of relationship and 16 months after engagement.
questions.guidance: Provide marriage date and context of relationship progression.
questions.tooltip: Marriage timing affects relationship authenticity assessment
variations: What is the date of your marriage?
When was your marriage solemnized?
When did you and your spouse get married?
What is the chronology of your marriage?

questions.question: How did you meet your spouse?
questions.sampleAnswer: Through social media in September 2019 via mutual friend introduction. Had common interests.
questions.guidance: Describe method, date, and how you connected (shared interests, etc.).
questions.tooltip: Meeting story is fundamental to relationship verification
questions.inputPlaceholder: Explain how you met your spouse
variations: Could you describe the circumstances of how you met?
Where and when did you first encounter your spouse?
Please explain the story of how you met.
What is the story of how you met?

questions.question: How long have you been in a relationship?
questions.sampleAnswer: 3.5 years from September 2019 to June 2023. 8 in-person visits, several days to weeks each.
questions.guidance: State duration and frequency of in-person contact.
questions.tooltip: Timeline consistency is crucial for relationship verification
variations: When did your relationship begin?
For what duration have you been together?
What is the period of time involved?
What period of time have you been together?

questions.question: How do you communicate with your spouse when apart?
questions.sampleAnswer: Daily video calls (30-60 minutes evenings), messages throughout day, longer calls on weekends.
questions.guidance: Specify methods (calls, video, messages) and frequency.
questions.tooltip: Communication patterns show genuine ongoing relationship
variations: What methods do you use when not together?
How often do you communicate while apart?
Please describe how you maintain contact.
What is your communication routine?

questions.question: How did both families react to your marriage?
questions.sampleAnswer: Both families delighted and supportive. Collaborated in wedding planning.
questions.guidance: Describe reactions and level of family involvement in marriage.
questions.tooltip: Family acceptance strengthens relationship credibility
variations: What was the reaction of your families?
Could you describe how families received the news?
How did your families respond to your union?
What was your families' response?

questions.question: Who attended your wedding?
questions.sampleAnswer: ~150 guests: parents, siblings, grandparents, aunts, uncles, cousins, close friends from both families.
questions.guidance: List approximate guest count and key family/friend categories.
questions.tooltip: Wedding attendance shows relationship authenticity
questions.inputPlaceholder: Describe wedding guests and family presence
variations: Could you list the key attendees?
Who were the guests present?
Please describe who was in attendance.
Who graced your wedding with their presence?

questions.question: Do you have mutual friends?
questions.sampleAnswer: Yes, several mutual friends who were at wedding and we spend time with regularly.
questions.guidance: Confirm mutual friendships and joint social activities.
questions.tooltip: Mutual friends provide additional relationship verification
questions.inputPlaceholder: Describe mutual friends and social circle
variations: Are there friends you and your spouse share?
Do you have any friends in common?
Are there shared acquaintances?
Are there people you consider mutual friends?

questions.question: What is your petitioner immigration status?
questions.sampleAnswer: US Citizen.
questions.guidance: State petitioner status: US Citizen, Green Card, etc.
questions.tooltip: Petitioner status affects visa eligibility and process
variations: Could you state the immigration status of the petitioner?
What is the current legal status of the petitioner?
Please specify the petitioner's immigration status.
What is the legal status of your petitioner?

questions.question: What is the household size?
questions.sampleAnswer: Two: myself and spouse. No dependents.
questions.guidance: List total number and composition (dependents, etc.).
questions.tooltip: Household size affects financial support calculations
variations: How many individuals reside in the household?
Please state the total number of people?
What is the household composition?
How many will live in your household?

questions.question: How will you be financially supported in the US?
questions.sampleAnswer: By spouse's income as project manager, 150% above federal poverty guidelines.
questions.guidance: State income amount and expected adequacy for household size.
questions.tooltip: Financial support verification is critical for visa approval
variations: What will be your source of financial support?
Please explain how you plan to cover expenses.
Who will be responsible for financial maintenance?
What financial backing will support you?

questions.question: Have you ever been refused a US visa?
questions.sampleAnswer: No.
questions.guidance: Answer yes/no. If yes, explain reason and changes made since.
questions.tooltip: Visa refusal history requires detailed explanation
questions.inputPlaceholder: Indicate any visa refusals if applicable
variations: Has a US visa application been denied?
Were you ever informed of ineligibility?
Have you had an unsuccessful visa application?
Have you experienced a visa denial?

questions.question: Have you ever overstayed a visa in any country?
questions.sampleAnswer: No.
questions.guidance: Answer yes/no. If yes, explain circumstances and any consequences.
questions.tooltip: Visa compliance history affects credibility
variations: Have you remained in a country beyond authorized period?
Did you ever exceed permitted visa duration?
Have you stayed past expiration in any country?
Have you overstayed in any country?

questions.question: What is your spouse's full name?
questions.sampleAnswer: John Ahmed Smith.
questions.guidance: Provide full legal name as it appears on official documents.
questions.tooltip: Full name verification against spouse's documents
questions.inputPlaceholder: Enter your spouse's full legal name
variations: What is your spouse's legal name?
Please state your spouse's full name.
Can you provide your spouse's complete name?
What is your spouse's name as shown on documents?

questions.question: What are the names of your spouse's immediate family members?
questions.sampleAnswer: Father: Ahmed Smith, Mother: Fatima Khan, Sister: Aisha Smith, Brother: Hassan Smith.
questions.guidance: List parents, siblings, and any dependents. Include relationship and full names.
questions.tooltip: Family composition verification against submitted documents
questions.inputPlaceholder: List immediate family members with relationships
variations: Who are your spouse's immediate family members?
Can you name your spouse's parents and siblings?
List your spouse's family members.
What are the names of your spouse's relatives?

questions.question: What is your spouse's age?
questions.sampleAnswer: 30 years old.
questions.guidance: Provide current age in years.
questions.tooltip: Age verification against marriage and identity documents
variations: How old is your spouse?
What is your spouse's age?
State your spouse's current age.
Can you provide your spouse's age?

questions.question: What is your spouse's educational background?
questions.sampleAnswer: Bachelor's degree in Business Administration, MBA in progress.
questions.guidance: List degrees, field of study, institution, and any ongoing education.
questions.tooltip: Educational background supports financial stability assessment
questions.inputPlaceholder: Describe your spouse's education and qualifications
variations: What is your spouse's education level?
Please describe your spouse's academic qualifications.
What degrees does your spouse hold?
